## Epic

Quality and Delivery

## Description

- Create profile page for account details and preferences
- Add editable fields for display name, locale, timezone, and currency format
- Use mock profile update handlers
- Design spec (must use; measurable):
  - Tokens per Issue 3
  - Settings grouped in card sections with 24px spacing between groups
  - Save/cancel action row remains visible on long forms
  - Validation errors displayed inline and in summary banner

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] User can view and edit profile settings
- [ ] Validation and save feedback are clear
- [ ] Changes persist after refresh via local storage/state
- [ ] PR includes screenshots (default/edit/error/saved)

## Suggested GitHub labels

`frontend`, `settings`, `priority-medium`
